name: Python Bot
description: A Python-based bot template with an async-ready structure. Uses a simple polling loop that you can replace with your preferred framework (discord.py, python-telegram-bot, etc).

defaultFiles.main.py:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# ─── Python Bot Template ────────────────────────────────────
# A simple bot skeleton that logs to stdout every 5 seconds.
# Replace the loop with your own async bot framework.

import time
import signal
import sys
import os

BOT_NAME = os.environ.get('BOT_NAME', 'PyBot')

def shutdown(signum, frame):
    print(f'[{BOT_NAME}] Received signal {signum}. Shutting down...')
    sys.exit(0)

signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, shutdown)
signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, shutdown)

def main():
    print(f'[{BOT_NAME}] Bot is starting...')
    print(f'[{BOT_NAME}] Bot is online!')
    tick = 0
    while True:
        tick += 1
        print(f'[{BOT_NAME}] Heartbeat #{tick} — {time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")}')
        time.sleep(5)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
